narrative:
Middletown City has 30,271 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
